channel.title: Pokemon GO News & Events
channel.description: Official Pokemon GO + GO Hub + LeekDuck

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Fire and Ice Hatch Day
item.description:
Trainers, Prepare your Incubators! We’re excited to announce that Magby and Smoochum will be featured during the upcoming Fire and Ice Hatch Day event!  Fire and Ice Hatch Day takes place on Saturday, August 8th, 2026, from 11:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. local time. This limited-time event features Magby and Smoochum eggs with boosted shiny […]

The post Fire and Ice Hatch Day appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Super Mega Raichu Raid Day
item.description:
Mega Raichu X and Mega Raichu Y debut in Pokémon GO during a special Super Mega Raid Day event on Saturday, July 18, 2026, from 2:00 p.m. to 5:00 p.m. local time. Trainers can look forward to Mega Raichu X and Mega Raichu Y in Super Mega Raids, with the potential to be shiny (with […]

The post Super Mega Raichu Raid Day appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: TCG 30th Celebration, New Pokémon Aeroplane, PokémonXP & Worlds Schedule, New LEGO and more!
item.description:
This week in Pokémon news has some really exciting announcement, with the 30th Celebration products for TCG being teased, a brand new Pokémon aeroplane, the schedule for the World Championships and PokémonXP event have been announced, new LEGO sets have been revealed, Zorua is coming to Pokopia, and a new POKÉTOON short has been released […]

The post Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: TCG 30th Celebration, New Pokémon Aeroplane, PokémonXP & Worlds Schedule, New LEGO and more! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Dynamax Trubbish Max Monday: Event Guide
item.description:
Trubbish Max Monday takes place on July 13th, 2026 when Trubbish will be appearing in power spots all day. This Max Monday is the third July Pokémon, and it is the return of Dynamax Trubbish! Dynamax Trubbish is a type which means it is only weak to and moves. It is a Tier 1 Dynamax […]

The post Dynamax Trubbish Max Monday: Event Guide appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] This Week in Pokémon GO: July 20 – July 26, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s July 20-26 week has us well into the season of Forever Forward! The post-GO Fest 10th anniversary celebrations continue with Professor Willow’s birthday! Professor Pikachu debuts, along with First Partner Pokémon with special 10th anniversary backgrounds. Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. ⭐Highlights Raid Boss Change […]

The post This Week in Pokémon GO: July 20 – July 26, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Raid Make-Up Event
item.description:
During Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global certain areas experienced issues with raids. This led to Scopely Explore turning off Team GO Rocket to help the event run smoother. Trainers experienced technical issues when attempting to join raid battles that led to them being unable to participate in raids. As a result, a special make-up raid […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Raid Make-Up Event appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Professor Willow’s Birthday Research
item.description:
Wish Professor Willow a very happy birthday with Professor Willow’s assistant Pikachu! This adorable Pikachu makes their Pokémon GO debut as part of the Willow’s Birthday Research event along with GO Snapshots, raids, and more from Tuesday, July 21, 2026, from 10:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. local time. A new costumed Pokémon will appear in […]

The post Professor Willow’s Birthday Research appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary Edition
item.description:
First Partner Pokémon with special backgrounds feature during the Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary event! The Pokémon GO Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary event runs from Tuesday, July 21, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. to Monday, July 27, 2026 at 8:00 p.m. local time. The event also sees a variety of rotating daily bonuses! This guide covers everything […]

The post Ultra Unlock: 10th Anniversary Edition appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] GO Pass August 2026: Latias, Bonuses and Lucky Trinket returns!
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s August 2026 GO Pass and GO Pass Deluxe feature exclusive rewards, including an encounter with Latias, XP and Stardust bonuses, and the return of the Lucky Trinket! This is the third and final GO Pass of the Forever Forward season. Trainers can earn GO Points by completing Pass Tasks, unlock milestone rewards through ranking […]

The post GO Pass August 2026: Latias, Bonuses and Lucky Trinket returns! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Pokémon GO August 2026 Events
item.description:
The Pokémon GO August 2026 events schedule is here! In July, featured Pokémon are Lunala, Shadow Altered Forme Giratina and Dynamax Magikarp. A variety of different Pokémon will be featured throughout the month, and there is a whole host of in-game events to look forward to! Here are all the major events happening in August 2026 […]

The post Pokémon GO August 2026 Events appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Could Finally Give Special Backgrounds a Bigger Purpose
item.description:
A newly datamined feature in Pokémon GO suggests that Trainers may soon be able to use their Buddy Pokémon’s Location Card or Special Background as their profile background. The feature isn’t live yet, but assets and functionality have been discovered in version 421.0. If Scopely decides to release this feature, it finally gives Trainers a […]

The post Pokémon GO Could Finally Give Special Backgrounds a Bigger Purpose appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO VP Michael Steranka on Arceus, Gym Updates, Remote Raids, and the Future of the Game
item.description:
During our visit to the Pokémon GO 10th Anniversary Celebration in New York City, we had the opportunity to speak with Michael Steranka, Vice President of Product at Scopely. Earlier in the event, Steranka and Ed Wu shared Scopely’s long-term vision for Pokémon GO, describing it as a “forever game” built around three core pillars for the next decade: […]

The post Pokémon GO VP Michael Steranka on Arceus, Gym Updates, Remote Raids, and the Future of the Game appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.
